title: Phase 2: Chunk Reader via zarrs_ffi
description:
## Goal
Implement ~100 LOC of chunk reading using zarrs_ffi C library for the duckdb-zarr extension.

## Tasks
1. Use zarrs_ffi C library for chunk retrieval and decompression
2. Open arrays with zarrsOpenArrayRW() for read access
3. Retrieve chunk data with zarrsArrayRetrieveChunk() (individual chunks)
4. Retrieve subsets with zarrsArrayRetrieveSubset() (optimized for query pushdown)
5. Leverage built-in codec support: blosc2, zstd, gzip, lz4
6. Handle sharded arrays with zarrsCreateShardIndexCache()

## Dependencies
- zarrs_ffi: All chunk handling is done via this library

## Key APIs
- zarrsOpenArrayRW() - Open array for reading
- zarrsArrayRetrieveChunk() - Get decompressed chunk by indices
- zarrsArrayRetrieveSubset() - Get decompressed subset (optimized for predicate pushdown)
- zarrsCreateShardIndexCache() - Efficient shard access for sharded arrays

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Can read chunks from Zarr v2 arrays
- [ ] Can read chunks from Zarr v3 arrays
- [ ] Decompression works (blosc2, zstd)
- [ ] Predicate pushdown reduces data read
- [ ] Build passes on CI
